text: An kashe mutane da yawa a harin da aka kai a kauyenmu jiya da dare

text: Mayakan sun kori mutane daga gidajensu, yanzu muna zaune a karkashin bishiya

text: Yara suna mutuwa saboda yunwa, babu abinci a wannan gari

text: Cutar kwalara ta bazu a duk fadin karamar hukuma, asibiti ya cika da marasa lafiya

text: Ambaliyar ruwa ta mamaye gidaje da gonakin manoma, mutane sun rasa komai

text: Mun bar gidanmu saboda tsoron hare-haren boko haram, muna gudun hijira yanzu

text: Ba mu da abinci na mako guda, yara suna kuka saboda yunwa

text: Ruwan sama ya yi yawa sosai, kogi ya cika har ya mamaye unguwanni

text: Kasuwa tana gudana yadda ya kamata a yau, mutane suna saye da sayarwa lafiya lau

text: Damina ta zo da kyau, manoma suna farin ciki da amfanin gona mai kyau
